narrative.zh: 世界杯来了！统计一下这个球员的进球概率——10场比赛进了几个球？
narrative.en: World Cup time! Track this player's scoring probability — goals in 10 matches?

narrative.zh: 教练要分析球队的得分趋势：1, 3, 5, 7, ?  下一场会进几个球？
narrative.en: Coach analyzes the scoring trend: 1, 3, 5, 7, ?  How many goals next?

narrative.zh: 比赛结束！把奖杯蛋糕平均分给球队的4个前锋！
narrative.en: Match over! Share the trophy cake equally among the 4 strikers!
